summary: Iteration 24 - Testing 6 UI fixes and Essay Scorer field mapping. All backend tests passed (12/12). All frontend features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check - backend responds correctly
Backend: Login with test@simplifii.com works
Backend: POST /api/user/complete-onboarding endpoint works
Backend: POST /api/user/pain-point endpoint works
Backend: PUT /api/user/profile endpoint works
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns hasCompletedOnboarding and painPoint fields
Backend: Profile update persists correctly (verified via GET)
Backend: POST /api/essay/score endpoint exists
Backend: Essay scorer validates essay text (rejects empty)
Backend: complete-onboarding requires authentication (401)
Backend: pain-point requires authentication (401)
Backend: profile update requires authentication (401)
Frontend: Essay Scorer page loads at /essay-scorer with essay text area, rubric upload, brief upload
Frontend: Profile Dropdown opens on click with Name, Email, Tickets, Saved Outputs, Account Settings, Buy Tickets, Referral Code (coming soon), Log Out
Frontend: Profile Dropdown 'Account Settings' navigates to /settings
Frontend: Settings page at /settings shows display name input, email (read-only), tickets count, account type, accessibility note, Save Changes button
Frontend: Onboarding Modal appears for users with hasCompletedOnboarding=false, has 4 steps with Next/Back buttons, closes with 'Get Started'
Frontend: Pain Points Card visible on dashboard sidebar with 5 options, selecting one and clicking Submit shows success message
Frontend: Explainer Video Placeholder visible on dashboard sidebar with play icon and 'Explainer video coming soon' text
Frontend: Accessibility Trigger in bottom-left shows Brain icon (not wheelchair)
Frontend: Mobile menu includes Settings link
critical_code_review_comments: EssayScorer.js: All 12 field mappings verified - essay_text, rubric_text, brief_text for input; criteria, overallFeedback, encouragement, completenessCheck, optInPrompt for output. Uses correct camelCase field names matching backend JSON schema.

Navigation.js: Profile dropdown implemented with ref-based outside-click closing (mousedown event). Contains all required items: Name, Email, Tickets count, Saved Outputs link, Account Settings link, Buy Tickets link, Referral Code (coming soon), Log Out button.
Settings.js: New page at /settings with profile editing (display name), read-only email, tickets count, account type, accessibility note. Uses PUT /api/user/profile endpoint.

Dashboard.js: OnboardingModal component shows 4 steps for new users (hasCompletedOnboarding=false). PainPointCard shows 5 options and submits to POST /api/user/pain-point. ExplainerVideoCard shows placeholder with play icon.
AccessibilityToolbar.js: Changed from Accessibility icon to Brain icon from lucide-react. Trigger button in bottom-left corner.
App.js: Added /settings route with ProtectedRoute wrapper.
Backend auth.py: Added POST /api/user/complete-onboarding, POST /api/user/pain-point, PUT /api/user/profile endpoints. All require authentication.
Backend models.py: User model includes hasCompletedOnboarding (bool, default false) and painPoint (Optional[str]).

test_credentials.note: Test user reset to hasCompletedOnboarding=false for future testing

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user. Test user state reset after testing.

mocked_apis.note: All endpoints are real. Stripe payments in TESTING_MODE.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 complete. Six UI fixes verified: (1) Essay Scorer page renders correctly with essay text area, rubric upload, brief upload - field mapping matches backend JSON schema. (2) Profile Dropdown in Navigation.js with all required items (Name, Email, Tickets, Saved Outputs, Account Settings, Buy Tickets, Referral Code coming soon, Log Out). (3) Settings page at /settings with profile editing, read-only email, account info, accessibility note. (4) Onboarding Modal for new users (hasCompletedOnboarding=false) with 4 steps. (5) Pain Points Card on dashboard sidebar with 5 options and Submit button. (6) Explainer Video Placeholder with play icon and 'coming soon' text. (7) Accessibility Trigger uses Brain icon (not wheelchair). (8) Mobile menu includes Settings link. Test user: test@simplifii.com / test123 - reset to hasCompletedOnboarding=false for future testing.
